Localization.Description: A connection is denied or detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} connection from {src.host} to {dst.host} is denied. Reason: {reason}.
A {protocol} connection from {src.host} to {dst.host} is detected
A {protocol} connection from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied. Reason: {reason}.
